enchantment.elytra_overdrive.overdrive.d: Allows the elytra to use the configured high-speed flight multiplier
enchantment.elytra_overdrive.breach.desc: Breaks through blocks ahead while flying at high speed with a trident.
text.config.elytra-overdrive.title: Elytra Overdrive Configuration
text.config.elytra-overdrive.option.play: Only applies while flying with an elytra enchanted with Overdrive. The server maximum always takes priority.
text.config.elytra-overdrive.option.enab: Unlocks the 100×–200× experimental speed range after an explicit performance warning.
text.config.elytra-overdrive.option.show: Shows a small local particle trail while Overdrive is active.
text.config.elytra-overdrive.option.enab: Server-authoritative switch for all Overdrive flight acceleration.
text.config.elytra-overdrive.option.serv: Clients can never exceed this server-authoritative multiplier.
text.config.elytra-overdrive.option.extr: Consumes one additional durability point at the configured interval while high-speed flight is active.
Ticks between additional durability attempts. Unbreaking still applies.
text.config.elytra-overdrive.option.elyt: Controls the enchantment quality used when a vanilla elytra is placed in an enchanting table.
text.config.elytra-overdrive.option.enab: Server-authoritative switch for dropping TNT while elytra flying.
text.config.elytra-overdrive.option.bomb: Server ticks between bombs while the use button is held.
Fuse duration in server ticks for dropped TNT.
Fraction of the player's horizontal velocity inherited by dropped TNT.
text.config.elytra-overdrive.option.enab: Server-authoritative switch for breaking blocks with a Breach trident during fast elytra flight.
text.config.elytra-overdrive.option.mini: Minimum real movement speed in blocks per tick required for Breach.
text.config.elytra-overdrive.option.maxi: Hard limit on unique block positions inspected for each player per server tick.
text.config.elytra-overdrive.option.brea: Scales trident durability cost based on each successfully broken block's hardness.
Generates loot-table drops after a permitted Breach break.
text.config.elytra-overdrive.option.prot: Prevents Breach from breaking containers and other blocks that store data.
disconnect.elytra_overdrive.client_requi: Elytra Overdrive is required on the client to join this server.
screen.elytra_overdrive.title: ELYTRA OVERDRIVE
screen.elytra_overdrive.subtitle: Advanced Flight Control System
screen.elytra_overdrive.flight.title: FLIGHT CONTROL
screen.elytra_overdrive.flight.experimen: Unlocks the 100×–200× experimental speed range. Extreme speeds may significantly increase chunk loading, world generation, memory usage, network traffic, and server tick load.
The current server limit is 100× or lower. Unlocking the experimental range will not increase your effective speed on this server.
screen.elytra_overdrive.firework.locked_: This feature must be enabled by the server administrator.
screen.elytra_overdrive.status.title: FLIGHT STATUS
screen.elytra_overdrive.status.no_data:
NO FLIGHT DATA
Enter a world to display live status.
screen.elytra_overdrive.status.lines:
Status: %1$s
Source: %2$s
Player: %3$s
Server: %4$s
Final: %5$s
Speed: %6$s
Elytra: %7$s
Firework Policy: %8$s
screen.elytra_overdrive.bombing.title: AERIAL BOMBING SYSTEM
screen.elytra_overdrive.breach.title: BREACH CONTROL
screen.elytra_overdrive.breach.patterns: Breach I: center block · Breach II: five-block cross · Breach III: 3×3 area
screen.elytra_overdrive.visual.title: VISUAL FLIGHT SYSTEM
screen.elytra_overdrive.server.title: SERVER RULES
screen.elytra_overdrive.server.read_only: Server rules are read-only in this terminal.
screen.elytra_overdrive.experimental_war:
Enabling this option unlocks flight multipliers up to 200×.

Speeds above 100× may significantly increase:

• Chunk loading pressure
• New chunk generation workload
• Memory usage
• Network synchronization traffic
• Client frame time
• Server tick load

On large worlds, non-pregenerated maps, lower-end hardware, or multiplayer servers, this may cause:

• Stuttering
• Delayed chunk loading
• World generation falling behind the player
• Increased memory usage
• Reduced server performance

Recommended only for powerful systems, pregenerated worlds, or high-performance servers.
command.elytra_overdrive.firework_mode.e: Held-firework Overdrive is now allowed by this server.
command.elytra_overdrive.firework_mode.d: Held-firework Overdrive is now disabled by this server.
command.elytra_overdrive.no_permission: You need administrator permission level 4 to change held-firework Overdrive.
